heading: Duration and term of stays; codefendants not in service
label: 3935 Duration and term of stays; codefendants not in service
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 525 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

children.heading: Period of stay
children.label: a Period of stay
children.text: A stay of an action, proceeding, attachment, or execution made pursuant to the provisions of this chapter by a court may be ordered for the period of military service and 90 days thereafter, or for any part of that period. The court may set the terms and amounts for such installment payments as is considered reasonable by the court.

children.heading: Codefendants
children.label: b Codefendants
children.text: If the servicemember is a codefendant with others who are not in military service and who are not entitled to the relief and protections provided under this chapter, the plaintiff may proceed against those other defendants with the approval of the court.

children.heading: Inapplicability of section
children.label: c Inapplicability of section
children.text: This section does not apply to sections 3932 and 4021 of this title.
